The risk

Manual procurement is fragmented, slow and hard to defend.

When tenders are managed through email, spreadsheets and shared drives, organisations lose control over documents, dates, communication, scoring and auditability.

Risk 01

No single source of truth

Versions multiply across inboxes and folders, making it difficult to prove which document, date or score was current.

Risk 02

Slow tender cycles

Manual chasing, score compilation and document distribution add unnecessary delays to formal procurement.

Risk 03

Fraud & favouritism risk

Uncontrolled processes increase exposure to disputes, inconsistent treatment and decisions that cannot be defended.

Introducing 4Tender

One controlled platform for competitive bidding.

4Tender digitises and governs the full lifecycle of a tender in one cloud-hosted web application.

✓Centralised: documents, dates, communications and scores in one place.
✓Governed: an enforced process no one can skip or shortcut.
✓Transparent: every supplier gets a fair, consistent experience.
✓Auditable: every action is logged and exportable.
Sector

Government & SOEs

Support legal, governance and anti-corruption requirements with a defensible procurement process.

Sector

Large corporates

Enforce procurement policy, improve cost control and give auditors a clear trail.

Sector

NGOs & donor-funded

Demonstrate fair procurement and strengthen donor reporting.

Sector

Infrastructure projects

Manage high-value contracts requiring multi-party evaluation and formal award decisions.

How it works

Eight enforced stages from setup to award.

The system moves each tender through a visible lifecycle. Stages 4–6 support independent governance, technical and financial scoring.

1Setup
2Advertised
3Clarifications Closed
4Governance
5Technical
6Financial
7Ready to Award
8Awarded
Role-based workspaces

Each user sees only the work they should.

4Tender separates responsibilities across setup, advisory, adjudication, chair, registrar and admin workspaces.

Tender Setup
Draft, advertise and run tenders end-to-end.
Advisor
Manage clarifications, briefings, bid applications and announcements.
Adjudicator
Score governance, technical and financial submissions independently.
Chair
Review score summaries and make the final award decision.
Registrar
Approve supplier registrations and profile change requests.
Scoring model

Three-stage weighted adjudication

Governance, technical and financial rounds can be weighted to total 100%, with pass/fail thresholds to eliminate submissions before the next stage where required.

✓Configurable percentage weights
✓Independent scoring lanes
✓Chair award summary with side-by-side scoring
✓Blind and locked adjudication to reduce score influence
Supplier experience

A self-service portal that keeps participation simple and fair.

Suppliers can register, get approved, browse opportunities, download documents, ask clarification questions and submit responses digitally.

Step 01

Register & get approved

Supplier companies register on the public portal and are reviewed by the Registrar before access is granted.

Step 02

Browse, apply & download

Suppliers can view open tenders, apply for private tenders and access ITT/RFP documents.

Step 03

Finalise submissions

Responses are uploaded, finalised, locked and confirmed with an automatic submission receipt.

Governance

Defensible by design.

4Tender creates a controlled process that can be defended to an auditor, board, donor or oversight body.

Control

Tamper-proof audit log

Every action is recorded with user, timestamp, entity and correlation ID.

Control

Blind adjudication

Committee members score independently with submission locking.

Control

Separation of duties

No single person can score and award alone.

Control

Export for auditors

The full trail can be exported to CSV for audit and board reporting.

Capabilities

One platform. Full tender control.

Designed for real-world procurement teams with multi-currency support, ERP references, automated emails and white-label branding.
